title: Design By Violet Christmas Robin Medium Gift Bag – Beautiful Winter Bird Design with Red Rope Handle – Great for Books, Toys & Small Gifts
features: MEDIUM GIFT BAG – Practical size measuring 25 cm x 21.5 cm x 10 cm – perfect for books, candles, accessories or sweet treats
WINTER ROBIN DESIGN – Features two hand-painted style robins perched on fir branches with red berries and a soft snowy background
ROPE HANDLE & TAG – Includes a bright red rope handle and a coordinating round robin gift tag for your message
REUSABLE WRAP – A quick, eco-friendly solution that saves time compared to traditional wrapping paper
description: Bring a touch of countryside charm to your gift-giving with this Design By Violet Christmas Robin gift bag. Featuring a delicate wintry background with two hand-painted style robins perched among snow-covered fir branches and holly berries, this design evokes the beauty of a crisp winter’s day. The soft, snowy details and muted tones make this bag a stylish choice for both adults and children. Crafted from sturdy card with reinforced sides and base, this bag is strong enough to hold a wide range of presents including clothing, books, toys and home accessories. The matching round gift tag shows one of the robins up close, and the red rope handle provides a secure and elegant finish. This bag is reusable and easy to use, making it a practical and eco-friendly alternative to wrapping paper – simply pop your present inside, add a message, and you’re ready to go.
